name: Reliance PRIME

rewards.displayCategory: Other participating Reliance Retail stores spends
Dining, movies, entertainment, domestic airlines & international spends

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 visits per quarter
international: 4 complimentary international airport lounge visits per year through Priority Pass membership, capped at 2 visits per quarter

joiningBenefits: Reliance Retail Voucher worth Rs 3,000 upon payment of joining fee

milestones.label: Reliance Retail Vouchers worth Rs 8,750 on overall annual retail spends of Rs 3 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Reliance Retail Vouchers worth Rs 8,750 on overall annual retail spends of Rs 3 lakh
additionalBenefits: Additional Reliance discount vouchers worth up to Rs 11,999 at participating Reliance Retail stores
One monthly BookMyShow movie ticket benefit worth up to Rs 250
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
internalNotes: Audited against official Reliance SBI Card PRIME terms on 2026-06-13.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-13.
Effective September 1, 2025, reward points accrual discontinued on Digital Gaming and Government spends. Rent payments also excluded from rewards.
7,500 Reward Points cap per statement cycle applies to accelerated reward categories (dining, movies, airlines, international).
